name: node-red-contrib-s2
description: Node-RED nodes for S2 energy management protocol (EN 50491-12-2)

scripts.copy-html: mkdir -p dist/nodes/s2-rm dist/nodes/s2-websocket dist/nodes/s2-rm-config dist/nodes/s2-cem-config dist/nodes/s2-rm/icons dist/nodes/s2-websocket/icons && cp src/nodes/s2-rm/index.html dist/nodes/s2-rm/ && cp src/nodes/s2-websocket/index.html dist/nodes/s2-websocket/ && cp src/nodes/s2-rm-config/index.html dist/nodes/s2-rm-config/ && cp src/nodes/s2-cem-config/index.html dist/nodes/s2-cem-config/ && cp icons/s2-logo.svg dist/nodes/s2-rm/icons/ && cp icons/s2-logo.svg dist/nodes/s2-websocket/icons/
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run test:unit
